heightened.text: You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.
The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.
The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

spell.name: Telekinetic Hand
spell.targets: 1 unattended object of Light bulk or less
spell.text: You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.text: A spell you can cast at will that is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
